content: JOHN SMITH - Senior Python Developer EXPERIENCE: - 5 years Python development experience - Expertise in Django, Flask, FastAPI - Machine Learning: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn - Built recommendation systems for e-commerce platform - Led team of 3 developers on AI chatbot project - AWS, Docker, Kubernetes deployment experience EDUCATION: - B.S. Computer Science, MIT (2018) - Machine Learning Specialization Certificate PROJECTS: - Developed neural network for image classification (95% accuracy) - Created NLP sentiment analysis tool for customer reviews - Built automated trading bot using Python and pandas SKILLS: Python, ML, AI, NLP, Computer Vision, AWS, DevOps
